commands.review_summary:
The PR clears TUI optimistic-submit state during Esc abort and session switches, adds focused regression coverage, and records the fix in the changelog.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +27, Docs +1. Total +30 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows the submit guard blocks on `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` while `abortActive()` only clears `pendingChatRunId`, so a state-level test can reproduce the stale busy lock without a live TUI run.

target.title: Fix TUI Esc abort stale busy state
target.body:
## Summary

- Clear `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` after a successful TUI Esc abort, alongside `pendingChatRunId`.
- Clear the same optimistic submit flag when switching sessions with other run state.
- Add focused regression coverage for aborting while both pending run id and optimistic submit state are set.

Fixes #86199

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: TUI Esc abort could clear the pending run id while leaving `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` set, causing the next prompt to be blocked as busy even though a second Esc reported `no active run`.

Real environment tested: macOS arm64, Node v22.22.0, OpenClaw worktree `tui-contradicting-esc-pattern`, commit 04dcad1e9b.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui-session-actions.test.ts
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  11 passed (11)
```

Observed result after fix: the regression test aborts a pending run with both `pendingChatRunId` and `pendingOptimisticUserMessage` set, verifies the backend abort receives the pending run id, and verifies both local pending-state fields are cleared. Session switching now also clears the optimistic flag with the other run-state fields.

What was not tested: no live interactive TUI PTY run was executed; coverage is focused unit coverage for the state transition that caused the stale busy lock.
